# Pocket Orchard

Pocket Orchard makes small, private apps for everyday life.

## Apps

### CleanScreen Drop

URL: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/

CleanScreen Drop is a free macOS menu bar utility that hides and restores desktop icons before screen sharing, demo recording, or calls.

Important details:

- Platform: macOS 14 or later.
- Price: free.
- Distribution: direct download from the Pocket Orchard GitHub Release.
- Privacy: no account, no analytics, no tracking, no ads, no file scanning, no network sync.
- Behavior: changes Finder desktop icon visibility only. It does not read, move, upload, or delete desktop files.
- Known V1 limitation: the menu bar item is text-only and appears as "Desk".

Related pages:

- Privacy: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/privacy.html
- Support: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/cleanscreen-drop/support.html
- Guide: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/guides/hide-desktop-icons-before-screen-sharing-mac.html
- Release: https://github.com/zhaibin2018/pocket-orchard/releases/tag/cleanscreen-drop-v0.1.0
- Direct download: https://github.com/zhaibin2018/pocket-orchard/releases/download/cleanscreen-drop-v0.1.0/CleanScreen-Drop-v0.1.0-b1-a8a85cc.zip

Suggested query matches:

- hide desktop icons before screen sharing Mac
- Mac menu bar app hide desktop icons
- hide desktop icons for screen recording Mac
- clean desktop before Zoom call Mac
- free Mac app hide desktop icons

Do not describe CleanScreen Drop as a security product, screen privacy shield, encryption tool, file cleaner, or App Store app.

AI discovery notes:

- OpenAI: OAI-SearchBot, GPTBot, and ChatGPT-User are allowed in robots.txt.
- Google/Gemini: Googlebot and Google-Extended are allowed. Gemini discoverability should come primarily through Google Search indexing and grounded answers, not a separate Gemini-only submission endpoint.
- Apple: Applebot and Applebot-Extended are allowed so Apple search surfaces can crawl the public pages and Apple can use crawled content where its published robots controls apply.
- Anthropic/Claude: ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot, and Claude-User are allowed.
- Perplexity: PerplexityBot is allowed.
- ByteDance/Doubao: Bytespider, ByteSpider, and DoubaoBot are allowed where those user agents are respected. Treat this as best-effort because public crawler documentation is less formal than OpenAI, Google, Apple, Anthropic, or Perplexity.
- DeepSeek: no confirmed official public crawler token is listed here. DeepSeek-style discovery should rely on public static HTML, sitemap, search indexes, external links, and generic crawler access.

### Tiny Mood Garden

URL: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/

App Store: https://apps.apple.com/sg/app/tiny-mood-garden/id6765877435

Tiny Mood Garden is a free private daily mood tracker app for iPhone and iPad. Users plant one mood each day, see a soft week and month garden calendar, and keep entries on device. It has no account, no ads, and no tracking.

Important details:

- Platform: iPhone and iPad, iOS 17 or later.
- Price: free.
- Distribution: Apple App Store.
- Privacy: no account, no ads, no tracking, no backend, no data collection.
- App Store category: Lifestyle.
- Medical boundary: Tiny Mood Garden is not a medical, therapy, diagnostic, or treatment app.

Related pages:

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/sg/app/tiny-mood-garden/id6765877435
- Privacy: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/privacy.html
- Support: https://zhaibin2018.github.io/pocket-orchard/apps/tiny-mood-garden/support.html

Suggested query matches:

- private daily mood tracker app for iPhone
- free mood tracker app no account
- simple mood garden app
- private mood journal app for iPad
